name: 16.9 fl oz Novelty Clear Glass Mugs - Bullseye's Playground™
description: Enjoy your favorite beverages in style with the 16.9 fl oz Novelty Clear Glass Mug from Bullseye's Playground. Crafted from durable glass, this mug offers a generous capacity, perfect for your morning coffee or evening tea. Its clear design adds a touch of elegance to your drinkware collection, while the comfortable handle ensures a secure grip. Ideal for personal use, this mug is a delightful addition to any kitchen.
